expectations.text: Task decomposition with edge cases for 2 methods
expectations.evidence: Decomposed into 7 tasks: 3 for reverse (basic, empty, null), 4 for isPalindrome (basic true, basic false, empty, null).

expectations.text: Sequential Agent calls instead of Team API
expectations.evidence: Uses Agent tool for each phase. No Team API calls.
Shows total cycles completed, all files created/modified, final test count, and next-step suggestions.
Session ends with summary and suggestions. No TeamDelete or shutdown_request.
